note_text: Wound note - Leftfoot. Meas 3.3x4.7x0.8cm. Heavy serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 59% gran, 41% slough. Periwound erythematous. Alginate dsg applied. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Morales notified.

Wound note - Leftfoot. Meas 3.3x4.7x0.8cm. Heavy serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 46% gran, 54% slough. Periwound erythematous. Collagen dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Castillo notified.
